name: Woolsthorpe Wind Farm

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2028-09 to 2028-09-20 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: Smallest T7 winner. ICA Partners (Mexican) is CIS counterparty; SPV is operating entity. Ratio Consultants + Elecnor as engineering/EPC partners. No post-T7 developer press located — medium confidence on ownership.

operational_notes: Mexican construction conglomerate ICA Partners is CIS counterparty; SPV 'Woolsthorpe Wind Farm Pty Ltd' is operating entity. Ratio Consultants + Elecnor engaged as engineering/EPC partners. Smallest T7 winner (72 MW). No post-T7 developer press release located as of Jul 2026 — medium confidence on ownership continuity.

timeline_events.title: CIS Tender 7 underwriting awarded (72 MW)
timeline_events.detail: ICA Partners's Woolsthorpe Wind Farm (VIC) wins CIS Tender 7 underwriting. Part of the 19-project / 7.8 GW package announced 2026-05-23.

sources.title: New projects to deliver 7.8 GW of clean energy (DCCEEW)
